_comment_scope: SCOPE: Cursor IDE only. These hooks fire only inside Cursor's Agent runtime. Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Copilot do NOT respect this file — they enforce the same workflow gates through their own entrypoint docs (CLAUDE.md, .codex/AGENTS.md, .gemini/GEMINI.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md). When you add or change a hook here, mirror the policy into those entrypoints if the gate should apply across all tools.
_comment_schema: SCHEMA: Verified against https://cursor.com/docs/agent/hooks. Real event names: preToolUse, postToolUse, afterFileEdit, beforeShellExecution, beforeReadFile, sessionStart, sessionEnd, etc. Hook scripts receive JSON via stdin (env vars: CURSOR_PROJECT_DIR, CURSOR_VERSION, CURSOR_USER_EMAIL). Exit code 2 = block, exit 0 = allow, other codes = fail-open. Set failClosed: true to block on crash/timeout.
_comment_parsing: JSON PARSING: hook scripts source .cursor/hooks/_lib.sh which uses `jq` when available (robust on nested/escaped JSON) and falls back to grep+sed for simple top-level keys when jq is missing. Both code paths handle the standard Cursor hook payloads in this file.
